title: FEP-e232: Object Links for quote posts and structured references
description: Implement FEP-e232 (Object Links). When a post contains a URL that points to another ActivityPub object (another post, another actor), add a structured Link tag to the Note's tag array: {"type": "Link", "href": "https://remote/post/123", "name": "RE: ...", "mediaType": "application/activity+json"}. This enables quote-post interop with Mastodon, Threads, Pleroma, Sharkey, and 12+ other implementations. Inbound: when receiving a Note with Link tags, render them as quoted/linked content in the Status JSON. ~100-150 lines.
